name: Norwegian Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cornstarch, skim milk, salt (if using), and egg whites. Mix at low speed until well blended.
2. Gradually add the ground beef to the mixture, continuing to mix at low speed until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Shape about 18 meatballs using approximately 1 1/2 tablespoons of the mixture for each meatball. The mixture will be soft.
4. Place the shaped meatballs in a greased or foil-lined 9 x 13 pan.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
6. Remove from the pan while still hot and transfer to a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
7. In a separate bowl, mix the cream of mushroom soup and remaining milk. Pour this mixture over the meatballs.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F for an additional 30 minutes.
9. Serve with a serving consisting of 3 meatballs and some sauce.
